svg.text: EGRESS ARCHITECTURE: Fighting FIB + Traffic Steering
Integrated Solution for Intelligent Path Selection with Full Internet Reachability
iBGP sessions to all edge servers
INTEGRATION: How Fighting FIB + Traffic Steering Work Together
Purpose: "How do I reach any origin?"
• BIRD receives full Internet routing table
• Kernel has routes for all destinations
• Scales with number of edge servers
• eBPF monitors TCP health per dest
1. Fighting FIB provides base routing table
4. Both use same kernel routing table
